# neon_api_key (Resource)

Manages a Neon API key. Import is not supported because the API key secret is only available at creation time.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "neon_api_key" "example" {
  name = "my-api-key"
}

output "api_key" {
  value     = neon_api_key.example.key
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A user-specified API key name.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the API key was created.
- `id` (Number) The API key ID.
- `key` (String, Sensitive) The generated API key. Only available after creation.
